rationale: Title X is stronger overall because it preserves the core intervention, imaging modality, device, target population, study type, and sample size. The 12-patient detail is important for interpreting a feasibility study in HR. Title Y is slightly clearer in spelling out left atrial appendage thrombus, but it loses useful specificity by omitting the sample size.
loser_weakness: Title Y is clear and polished, but less informative because it does not disclose the small 12-patient cohort.
